wikidata-org-desc: Habaynta iyo wax ka beddellada Wikibase ee u gaarka ah wikidata.org
tag-client-automatic-update: Cusboonaysiin toos ah oo ka timaadda wiki-ga ku xiran
tag-client-automatic-update-description: Wax ka beddel si toos ah loo sameeyay sababtoo ah bog ku xiran ayaa la raray ama la tirtiray.
tag-client-linkitem-change: Isbeddelka xiriirka bogga ee ka yimid wiki-ga ku xiran
tag-client-linkitem-change-description: Wax ka beddel lagu sameeyay iyadoo la adeegsanayo is dhexgalka sitelinks ee wiki-ga ku xiran.
tag-termbox-description: Wax ka beddel lagu sameeyay iyadoo la adeegsanayo is dhexgalka sanduuqa erayada ee mobilka.
tag-wikidata-ui-description: Wax ka beddel gacanta lagu sameeyay iyadoo la adeegsanayo is dhexgalka caadiga ah ee Wikidata.
